final:
module jk_flip_flop (  
    input wire obf_J,  
    input wire K,  
    input wire clk,  
    input wire reset,  
    output reg Q  
);  
    always @(posedge clk or posedge reset) begin  
        if (reset)  
            Q <= 0;  
        else begin  
            case ({obf_J, K})  
                2'b10: Q <= 1;  // Set  
                2'b01: Q <= 0;  // Reset  
                2'b11: Q <= ~Q; // Toggle  
                default: Q <= Q; // Hold  
            endcase  
        end  
    end  
endmodule
